programmes.show_description: Gnóthaíonn Irene an crannchur mór agus ní fada go mbíonn Coach caite sna fataí lofa aici. (After Irene wins the lottery, she dumps Coach, infuriating the rest of the gang.)
Is é Cearbhall Ó Dálaigh a bheidh faoi chaibidil ar an gclár seo. (Cearbhall Ó Dálaigh who was President of Ireland from 1974 - 76 is the focus of this episode.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Leaneann an Dr. Colm Mac Gearailt lorg Annraoi Ó Liatháin fad na Siúire. (Dr. Colm Mac Gearailt continues in the footsteps of Annroai O' Liatháin along the River Suir.)
Cuirfear deireadh leis an tsraith in oirdheisceart an Chláir ag Seó Bhaile an Droichid. (The series wraps in Southeast Clare at the Bridgetown Show.)
Táthar ag athrú spóirt do Underdogs TG4 agus anois beifear ag tabhairt aghaidh ar Shacar na mBan! (The goalposts have shifted for TG4 Underdogs as they tackle Women's Soccer!)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Déanann Bréidín pitseámaí olla do Chlúmh, ach is mó suim atá ag Clúmh sa bpáipéar beartán. (Tweedy makes a woolly onesie for Fluff but he's far more interested in the wrapping!)
Is iomaí sin rud a chloisfí sa gcoill! (There are lots of different sounds in the woods!)
Bíonn Cory ag súil go mór am a chaitheamh lena dhlúthchara Freddie ag an campa Samhraidh. (Cory is excited to spend lots of time with his Best Friend Freddie at Camp Friendship.)
Beidh Abby agus Rudy ina ngrúmaeirí madraí inniu. (Abby and Rudy are dog groomers today.)
Éiríonn le Posy éacht a dhéanamh le linn cluiche Superball ach ní fheiceann aon duine í. (During a game of Superball, Posy makes an amazing catch that no one else sees.)
Bíonn Bobble ag déanamh aithrise ar gach uile dhuine go dtí go dtosaíonn Fobble ag déanamh aithrise air féin! (Bobble won't stop playing the 'copying game'.)
Dúisíonn an Ninja Oíche dragan. An gcuirfidh seisean na laochra de dhroim seoil? (Night Ninja steals an ancient gong to awaken a real Dragon!)
Ceapann Nín go bhfuil a cuid cnaipí caillte aice ach tá bealach ag Wussywat len iad a fháil ar ais. (Ird thinks her buttons are lost forever.)
Beidh tuilleadh eachtraí ag Zou agus a chairde inniu. (Zou and his friends have more adventures today.)
Tugann cairde Ricky cead a chinn dó na cluichí ar fad don lá a roghnú. (Ricky is happy when his friends agree to allow him to pick all the games for the day.)
Tá Mealbhacán Uisceasár Óg sáinnithe ar an trá. (A young Watermelonsuchus gets beached during a heatwave.)
Tá Dot agus a cairde ag díol sláthach le hairgead a bhailiú don chlub cispheile. (Dot and her friends try to raise funds for their basketball league by selling homemade slime.)
Aimsíonn Ella agus Henry capall adhmaid agus glaonn siad Trup Trup air. (Ella and Henry find a wooden horse in the garden while playing and they call it Trup Trup.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá Charlie agus Lola ag súil go mór le seó puipéad. (Charlie and Lola are looking forward to a Chinese puppet show.)
Aimsíonn na cairde frog... nó an prionsa dathúil é i ndáiríre? (The friends find a frog... or is he a handsome prince?)
Tá Caipín i ngreim ag Norbert agus caithfidh Pat teacht i gcabhair air. (Norbert catches Hoodie, so Pat has to rescue him from the pound.)
Tá Angelo ag dul ag campáil sa ghairdín cúil. (Angelo decides to camp in the back garden.)
Tá fadhb ó thaobh slándála ag Club na Láimhe Láidre. (The Purple Hand gang is having a security problem.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán spraíúil faoi shiorcín óg a bheidh inniu againn. (A fun song about a Baby Shark.)
Is breá le hOcht Déag luas. (We meet Eighteen and learn that he loves speed.)
Caithfidh na Dathanna iad féin a eagrú ar roth mór inniu! (Today, the Colours have to organise themselves on a big wheel!)
Tá sé ag cinneadh ar na Trí Bhéar caisleáin ghainimh a thógáil! (The Three Bears are having trouble building sandcastles!)
Beidh muid ag foghlaim faoi eilifintí sa zú inniu. (Today at the zoo, we're learning facts about elephants with songs and fun.)
Tugann Posy ceann dá pictiúir do Pip. (Posy gives Pip one of her paintings.)
Cé atá ag salú na háite? Níl Glibín sásta ar chor ar bith. (Glibín wants to find out who's throwing rubbish everywhere.)
Daltaí Scoil Lorcáin i mBaile Manach a rachaidh i mbun pinn an tseachtain seo chun amhrán a chumadh faoi bháid. (Music series for children presented by John Sharpson.)
Tá George ag iarraidh a bheith ina chleasghleacaí. (George realises that there's nothing he wants more in life than to be an acrobat.)
Samhlaíonn Ruarc an cineál saoil a bheidh aige ina theagascóir spóirt uisce nuair a bheidh sé mór. (Ruarc imagines his life as a water sport instructor when he grows up.)
Tá deacrachtaí ag Zou lena thionscadal ealaíne. (Zou has some difficulty with his art project today.)
Tá DeeDee ag iarraidh an seomra suí a athmhaisiú ach ní thuigeann Nino cén fáth. (Nino can't understand why DeeDee wants to redecorate her sitting room.)
Tógann Seoirse caisleán gainimh ar an trá. (Seoirse goes to the beach and makes a sandcastle.)
I measc na n-ainmhithe a bheidh ar Ainmhithe Craiceáilte an lae inniu beidh cat mífhoighneach agus nathair ag cadhcáil. (Today we'll see toasted cats and kayaking snakes.)
Mártan Ó Ciardha iar-Eagraí Spóirt RTÉ Raidió na Gaeltachta a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín. Mártan Ó Ciardha, veteran sports journalist from Cois Fharraige is this week's guest.
Réitíonn Lois amach í féin tar éis di droch léirmheas ó dhuine de na custaiméirí. (Lois gets dolled up after a scathing customer review.)
Bíonn béile ag Diane le máthair Frasier, an síceolaí cáiliúil. (Diane shares a very pleasant dinner with Frasier's famous psychologist mother.)
Beidh an grúpa Monks of the Screw, Eoghan agus Flaithri Neff agus Seán Ó Sé ar an gclár. (Traditional music from Cork and Kerry. Presented by Eibhlín de Paor.)
Fágann milliúnaí an chuid is mó d'eastát ag a mhadra agus ní mó ná sásta atá a chlann faoi. (A millionaire dies and leaves most of his estate to a dog.)
Lig do dhomhan na bhfia-chat tú a chur faoi dhraíocht. (Allow yourself to be amazed by the world of wild cats.)
Tugann Paul aghaidh ar chuid de na lochanna gar de Meadhan na h-Alba sa gclár seo. (Paul explores some lochs close to Scotland's densely populated Central Belt.)
Beidh scoth an cheoil tíre ar an gclár seo le John McNicholl agus Colleen Gormley, as Doire. (This show features the best of Irish Country music.)
Tá sé ag goilleadh ar Lorelai go bhfuil Rory mór le Richard agus le Emily. When Richard and Rory form an instant bond during a wonderful day of golf, Lorelai feels left out.
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

Caithfidh Fionn agus Nóra dul siar go dtí na 1850idí chun tubaiste aeráide a stopadh. (Fionn and Nóra must go back to the 1850s to prevent a climate catastrophe.)

Tugann trí fhoireann aghaidh ar a chéile chun an pota óir a bhuachan. Seó cluichí á chur i láthair ag Eibhlín Ní Chonghaile. (Gameshow in which 3 teams compete to win the jackpot.)
Tugann Joe Ó Dónaill agus Ray Mac Mánais faoi chamchuairt shiamsúil mórthimpeall na tíre. (Joe Ó Dónaill and Ray Mac Mánais set off on an amusing road trip across the country.)
Bíonn sé ina raic idir Natasha agus Cam nuair a chuireann sí dúnmharú ina leith. (Things become heated between Natasha and Cam as she throws murder accusations at him.)
Bíonn béile ag Diane le máthair Frasier, an síceolaí cáiliúil. (Diane shares a very pleasant dinner with Frasier's famous psychologist mother.)
Ní bheidh na taistealaithe ag dul i bhfad ó bhaile agus iad ag tabhairt aghaidh ar Chathair Dhoire. (This week, the trio are not venturing far from home as they head off to Derry.)
Tugtar léargas ar thurgnamh chun éagsúlacht pónairí na hEorpa a shábháil sa gclár faisnéise seo. (This documentary looks at an experiment to save Europe's bean diversity.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Bíonn sé ina raic idir Natasha agus Cam nuair a chuireann sí dúnmharú ina leith. (Things become heated between Natasha and Cam as she throws murder accusations at him.)
Tagann Lorraine ar Dot sa deireadh le cabhair ó dhaoine ar a haithne. (Lorraine uses her powerful political and financial connections to pin down Dot.)
Is é Patrick Hillery a bhí ina Uachtarán ar Éirinn ó 1976 - 1990 a bheidh faoi chaibidil. (Patrick Hillery, President of Ireland from 1976 - 1990, is the focus of this episode.)

Tugann Joe Ó Dónaill agus Ray Mac Mánais faoi chamchuairt shiamsúil mórthimpeall na tíre. (Joe Ó Dónaill and Ray Mac Mánais set off on an amusing road trip across the country.)

Seasfaidh Ardal O'Hanlon in Árainn, ar an mBlascaod Mór, i nDairbhre agus ar Sceilg Mhichíl. (Ardal O'Hanlon explores the rich wildlife and communities of Ireland's islands.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá damhán alla i ndoirteal na cistine! (There's a spider in the kitchen sink!)
Tá sé in am dinnéir agus tá Cody ag tabhairt lámh dá dhaide leis na glasraí. (It's dinner time and Cody is helping his dad add some vegetables.)
Tá sé in am torthaí a chur! (It's time to grow grow grow your fruit!)
Tá Daide ag iarraidh picnic a bheith aige ach rinne sé dearmad ar an mbia! (Papi is having a quesadilla picnic, but he forgot the ingredients!)
Ag foghlaim le rudaí a thógáil a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about building things today.)
Ní mó ná sásta a bhíonn Frankie nuair a sceitheann Zac na rúin a bhaineann lena cleasa draíochta. (Zac upsets Frankie by revealing the tricks in her magic show.)
Tá crann na nOlobobanna i bhfad ró-fhuar agus cruthaíonn siad Clúmhach le réiteach a fháil ar an scéal. (The Olobobs Tree is too cold so they get help to warm it up.)
Tá Gekko ag ceapadh gur cheart dó féin a bheith i lár an aicsin. (Gekko must learn to face his mistakes to defeat Night Ninja and save the museum from getting sticky splated.)
Déanann Wussywat páirc spraoi le go mbeidh an-spraoi ag Eli. (Wussywat wants to help Eli have some adventurous fun.)
Socraíonn Clifford, Bláithín agus Laoch a bheith ina n-oifigigh shábháilteachta cosúil le Turloch. (The other dogs want to be safety officers just like Tucker.)
Cén rún atá ag cairde Woozle? (Woozle wants to know what everyone is being secretive about.)
Téann Split amú sa gcoill fad a bhíonn sé ag leanúint Sillíchosach lonrach. (Split follows a glowing Chillipede into the Spooky Forest and gets lost in a tree maze.)
Samhlaíonn Alice a Mamó agus í ina foghlaí mara. (Alice imagines her grandmother as a pirate.)
Tá Alice i mbun caifé ach ní éistíonn sé leis na custaiméirí. (Alice is running a cafe, but she's not listening to her customers.)
Tá Alice agus Emile ag ligean orthu féin gur sárlaochra iad. (Alice and Emile play superheroes.)
Téann na Neacha Beaga ar thuras mórthimpeall na sceire agus iad ag foghlaim faoi chairdeas. (The Reefies go on a tour of the reef to learn about friendships.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá Charlie, Marv, Lotta agus Lola ag súil go mór leis an lá spóirt. (Charlie, Marv, Lotta and Lola are all looking forward to the sports day.)
Tá eilifint bheag le sábháil ach níl Tim ag tarraingt leis an gcuid eile de na Petronix. (Tim isn't being a very good teammate and it creates tension for the Defenders.)
Tugann Fionnuala cead do Lola agus do Lucy Pompom a thabhairt leo chuig an bpáirc shiamsaíochta. (Honorine lets Lola and Lucy take Pompom to the amusement park.)
Tá an banna ceoil Slobber ag fanacht tigh Angelo. (The band Slobber come to live in Angelo's house.)
Tá an t-údar is fearr le Learaí ina chónaí ar shráid Dhónaill. (Learaí's favourite author is living on Dónall's street.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán spraíúil faoi fhéileacán, bóín Dé agus bumbóg a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about a Butterfly, a Ladybug & a Bumblebee.)
Tá an-spraoi ag na dronuilleoga ar na lúbáin. (The rectangles are having fun doing loop-the-loops.)
Tá na Dathanna ar fad tagtha le chéile inniu  le dul ag spraoi. (Today, all the Colours come together to play.)
Tá Gabh agus Stop ag fáil faoi réir do phicnic. (Sing along with Go and Stop as they get ready for a picnic.)
Tá bréagán nua de shár-choinín sa Naíonra agus tá Timmy ar bís gurb eisean an chéad pháiste le dul ag spraoi leis. (There is a new super-rabbit toy in the Nursery.)
Tá Euan leis an lá a chaitheamh in éineacht lena Dhaideo Micheál. (Euan is going to spend the day with his Daideo Micheál.)
Ní thaitníonn sé le Pip go bhfuil éan lachan á leanúint. ( A duckling begins to follow Pip around, making him feel uncomfortable.)
Faigheann na Béiríní amach go bhfuil bealaí go leor ann le dul ag spraoi le chéile. (The Bears learn that you can play together in different ways.)
Bíonn deacrachtaí ag Gobnait teacht ar uirlis speisialta dá cuid féin. (Gobnait has trouble finding an instrument for the book band.)
Tá cnoc oighir Bhailí ag imeacht le sruth! (Oh no! Bhailí's iceberg keeps getting pushed along by the ocean current.)
Samhlaíonn Muireann a saol ina traenálaí sacair nuair a bheidh sí mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Muireann imagines her life as a soccer coach when she grows up.)
Féachfaidh Zou le curiarracht dhomhanda a bhaint amach le cabhair óna theaghlach. (Zou attempts to set a world record today with help from his family.)
An bhfuil aon draíocht ag DeeDee chun tuilleadh misnigh a thabhairt do Tomaí? (Does DeeDee have some magic spell to help Tommy be more courageous?)
Beidh Sibéal agus a cara Molly ag díol líomanáide inniu. (Today, Sibéal and her friend Molly will sell lemonade at a market!)
I measc na n-ainmhithe a bheidh ar chlár an lae inniu beidh pandaí ag spraoi agus coiníní ag múineadh. (Today we'll see pandas play, dogs dive and rabbits teach.)
Máirín de Brún as Maínis i gCarna a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín. (Máirín de Brún from Maínis near Carna in the west Galway Gaeltacht is Máirtín's guest.)
Tá gean ag Dorothy ar mhúinteoir scoile le fada an lá agus tá borradh faoin gcaidreamh arís. (A teacher breathes life into Dorothy's decades-old crush on him.)
Tá Dorothy craiceáilte i ndiaidh duine d'fhoireann "Beatlemania". (Dorothy goes bananas over a "Beatlemania" cast member.)
Ceol traidisiúnta den scoth ón deisceart á chur i láthair ag Eibhlín de Paor. (This show features Nicky and Ann McAuliffe, and Diarmuid, Deirdre and Donnacha Moynihan.)
Cuirtear i leith fear óg gur dhúnmharaigh sé bean níos sine ná é a raibh sé mór léi. (Whilst in Seattle, the wealthy girlfriend of Jessica's secretary is murdered.)
Seasfaidh Ardal O'Hanlon in Árainn, ar an mBlascaod Mór, i nDairbhre agus ar Sceilg Mhichíl. (Ardal O'Hanlon explores the rich wildlife and communities of Ireland's islands.)
Tugann Paul faoi thuras de chósta Argyll sa gclár seo. (Paul explores the magical Argyll coast, starting from the sacred sands of Kilmory Bay on Loch Sween.)
Beidh Helen McCabe ag gabháil fhoinn ar an gclár. (Helen McCabe performs on the show.)
Níl ag éirí rómhaith le Rory sa scoil nua. (Rory has trouble getting good grades at her new school.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

Fiosraíonn Cormac Ó hÁdhmaill an tionchar a imríonn tailte portaigh ar chultúr tíre. (Cormac Ó hÁdhmaill explores the wildlife and cultural influence of the world's peatlands.)
